title: SaoWorld
description: This mod adds items and weapons, a skill system and character leveling to minecraft from the anime Sword Art Online
body:
### **What does this mod add to minecraft?**
 This mod adds a leveling system, a skill system, a weapon skill system, a blacksmith craft system and others to Minecraft
 New items by type: artifacts, weapons, armor, all sorts of interesting items

###  What is currently in the mod?
 at the moment, there is little in the mod, but a lot of interesting things: leveling system passive skills weapons weapon skills scabbard system crystal recovery and crystal teleportation, Kirito's armor and its appearance in white and red style
